fields.name: currency_code
fields.description: The 3-letter ISO 4217 currency code (e.g., USD, EUR, JPY)

fields.name: units
fields.description: The whole units of the monetary amount (e.g., for USD, 1 unit = 1 dollar)

fields.name: nanos
fields.description: Number of nano (10^-9) units of the amount, ranging from -999999999 to +999999999

fields.name: currency_codes
fields.description: List of supported ISO 4217 currency code strings

fields.name: from
fields.description: The monetary amount and source currency to convert from

fields.name: to_code
fields.description: The 3-letter ISO 4217 currency code to convert to

fields.name: {currency_code}
fields.description: EUR-based exchange rate for each currency. Keys are ISO 4217 currency codes, values are string representations of the exchange rate relative to EUR (EUR=1.0). Loaded from data/currency_conversion.json containing 33 currencies sourced from the European Central Bank.
